attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.HIERARCHY_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.HIERARCHY_INTERFACE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_1_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_2_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_3_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_4_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_5_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_6_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_7_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_8_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_9_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_10_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_11_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_12_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_13_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_14_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.NODE_15_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL,
(
select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL
minus
select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL
) ACM
where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.OGG_KEY_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HRCHY_NODES_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME
